title: lavandula pedunculata subsp. cariensis
intro: Lavandula pedunculata subsp. cariensis is a subspecies of the Lavandula pedunculata plant, commonly known as the Turkish lavender. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lavandula pedunculata subsp. cariensis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and relieving symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote a good night's sleep and reduce inflammation.
